mapper.select: SELECT P.*, D2.DNAME AS DNAME2, D1.DNAME AS DNAME3 FROM PROFESSOR P INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D1 ON P.DEPTNO = D1.DEPTNO INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D2 ON D1.PART = D2.DEPTNO

SELECT S.*, D2.DNAME AS DNAME2, D1.DNAME AS DNAME3, D3.DNAME AS SUB_DNAME3, P.NAME AS PROF_NAME FROM STU S LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D3 ON S.DEPTNO2 = D3.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN PROFESSOR P ON S.PROFNO = P.PROFNO INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D1 ON S.DEPTNO1 = D1.DEPTNO INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D2 ON D1.PART = D2.DEPTNO WHERE 1 = 1
AND S.GRADE= #{grade}
